function: () => { const t = document.title; const d = document.querySelector('meta[name=description]') && document.querySelector('meta[name=description]').content; const c = document.querySelector('link[rel=canonical]') && document.querySelector('link[rel=canonical]').href; const h1 = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('h1')).map(e=>e.textContent.trim().slice(0,80)); const h2 = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('h2')).map(e=>e.textContent.trim().slice(0,80)); const og = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('meta')).filter(m => (m.getAttribute('property')||'').startsWith('og:')).map(m => ({p: m.getAttribute('property'), c: m.getAttribute('content')})); const products = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[class*=product], [class*=item], a[href*="producto"]')).slice(0, 10).map(e => ({tag: e.tagName, cls: e.className && e.className.toString().slice(0,80), txt: (e.textContent||'').trim().slice(0,60), href: e.href || ''})); return JSON.stringify({title: t, desc: d, canonical: c, h1, h2, og, products, h1Count: h1.length, h2Count: h2.length}, null, 2); }
